## Description
<!-- Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. -->
<!-- Please also include relevant motivation and context for the trading logic or UI adjustments. -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Please check the relevant option -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Exchange integration update
- [ ] Documentation update

## Security Checklist
<!-- Crucial for TradeOS PRs -->
- [ ] My code DOES NOT log or expose user API keys/secrets.
- [ ] I have not weakened the Vault encryption or iteration count.
- [ ] Withdrawal permission blocks are still intact.

## How Has This Been Tested?
- [ ] Tested locally with OpenClaw
- [ ] Tested API connection (Testnet/Paper trading preferred)
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
